header.goal: Land AO's move to a 51% majority through his Aelio vehicle — written intent 10 Jul, term sheet 18 Jul, notary 3–7 Aug, money landed and 51% on record 28 Aug — while collecting the EUR 2.13M capital-call balance.

decisions.question: The EUR 100K reconciliation — hold our EUR 7.0M figure, or concede AO's EUR 6,900,668 and credit the difference?

options.text: Accept AO's EUR 6,900,668; credit EUR 99,332 to the next capital call. ~EUR 100K of goodwill going into the majority ask — removes AO's 'I overpaid' irritant days before the 51% commitment (working brief Q-2, 7 Jul).
Keep the EUR 7.0M position and reconcile line-by-line with Constantinos. Saves the credit if our figure wins, but keeps a EUR 100K argument alive through the majority negotiation.

decisions.trigger: Written-intent chase for the 51% majority goes to AO via Constantinos ~10 Jul

items.label: AO CAPITAL CALL — VIENNA HOTEL EUR

Villa Gabbiano reignition — family on site 2–16 Aug

Three ownership corrections logged: Joseph = son-in-law; EUR 1.9M = AO capital call for Vienna; Irina stays with this desk

read.point: The Hunter — most alive during the chase, bored by maintenance. Frame every ask as a hunt, never housekeeping.
Rule Zero — never let silence precede an ask. His line: “you only call me when you need money.” Max 14-day quiet gap.
Ownership recognition is a live nerve — always “we / our project”; he publicly corrected DV in Monaco (“half of Udmurtia”).
Investment filter — credible luxury brand as equity co-investor; “less money in = more interesting”; no brand = no deal.
Loyalty is earned by access, gestures and selfless service (the Ettore model) — social capital beats spreadsheets.
Reaches you on WhatsApp, effectively never email; decides fast once convinced. Last direct contact 6 Jul.

red_flags.flag: Villa Gabbiano reignition — purchase cancelled-for-now; family on site 2–16 Aug. Any re-mention re-surfaces the dissuasion memo.
Cadence risk — the 10 Jul written-intent ask must not land after a quiet spell (Rule Zero).
Ownership over-claim — never claim sole ownership in AO’s presence (tested and failed in Monaco).
Joseph hotel target — family-sourced, adviser-opposed (Constantinos: “too dangerous”). No acceleration before desk read + your gate.
The 48/45 economic gap — 3% unresolved; raise only if AO does. Term-sheet math will put it on the table.
